noCourse: You have no course yet. Create your first course to start getting applications.
noSchool: You currently do not have a school or are experiencing an error. Please create a new school to continue.

view.courseLink: The link to your course page will be
view.applicationLink: The link to your application page will be

qrCode.title: Send QR Code for Attendance
qrCode.description: A QR code will be sent to the student's email after they register for the course. The QR code will be used to check in for the course.

publishCourse.publishCourseDescription: Are you sure you want to publish this course?
publishCourse.unpublishCourseDescription: Are you sure you want to unpublish this course?
publishCourse.archiveCourseDescription:
Are you sure you want to archive this course?
* All course records, schedules, and payment receipts will remain accessible for review.
* Archived courses cannot accept new applications.
You can unarchive this course at any time from the Archived Courses section.
publishCourse.unarchiveCourseDescription:
Are you sure you want to unarchive this course?
* This course will be moved back to the active courses list.
* It will become available for new applications and management actions.
You can archive this course again at any time if needed.
publishCourse.archiveCourseDetails: All course records, schedules, and payment receipts will remain accessible for review.
publishCourse.archiveCourseRestriction: Archived courses cannot accept new applications.
publishCourse.archiveCourseReversible: You can unarchive this course at any time from the Archived Courses section.
publishCourse.remindLongDescriptions: Your course has not been published yet. Please type something in the 'Description' tab. Then, save and try again.
publishCourse.recruitmentTimeEnded: You have set the end date of the recruitment duration in the past. Please set it to a future time.

courseDescription.regular: Regular class type is being replaced by Regular Classes V2. Existing classes will work as usual, but no new regular classes can be created.

classTypeFinder.title: Class Type Finder
classTypeFinder.subtitle: Answer a few questions to find the perfect class type for your needs
classTypeFinder.notSureTitle: Not sure which class type to choose?
classTypeFinder.notSureDescription: Take our quick quiz to find the perfect class type for your teaching style and student needs.

recommendation.title: We found the perfect class type for you!

timeSlots.question: Do your students need to select time slots?

recurring.question: Is your event or class happening again in the future?

options.no: No, it is a one-time-only event

availability.question: Do your students choose time slots from all your daily availability?

options.flexible: Yes, students can choose their own time slots from all our available time
options.fixed: No, we have set up all the time slots in advance (e.g. every Monday 4–6 PM)

monthlyStart.question: Do your classes begin at the start of a month?

options.no: No, all students can start and end at different times

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: Ongoing membership with recurring payments - perfect for continuous learning programs

event.title: Events
event.description: One-time or manually scheduled sessions - perfect for workshops and special events

appointment.title: Appointments
appointment.description: Individual bookings with flexible scheduling - perfect for one-on-one sessions where students book available time slots

regularV2.title: Regular Classes V2
regularV2.description: Advanced recurring lessons with periods and gaps - perfect for structured monthly programs

recurring.title: Recurring Schedule
recurring.description: Availability-based weekly schedule - perfect for flexible recurring classes

classUnavailableReasons.title: Why is my course not showing here?
classUnavailableReasons.noTimeslotAtFuture: The course has no available time slots in the future
classUnavailableReasons.noTimeslotAtClass: You have not set up any time slots in the classes
classUnavailableReasons.regularClassNotAvailableTitle: You can only create new regular classes until 15 September 2025.
classUnavailableReasons.regularClassNotAvailableConfirm: In the meantime, existing regular classes can still be applied and used as usual. However, the class type will no longer be updated
classUnavailableReasons.regularClassNotAvailableConfirm2: Note that regular classes will not be converted into regular classes v2. Please start creating regular classes v2 instead for your future classes.

basic.previewImageTips: Recommend image of aspect ratio 21:9 and width greater than 1,000 pixels.

subscriptionSetting.chargeCycleHint: The billing date will count from the date of enrolment.

enrollment.enrollmentDescriptionTips: This description will appear on the enrollment page. You can use this to explain the enrollment process, or any other information that is relevant to the enrollment.

class.showCurrency: The price is calculated in your site currency of

class.name: Class name

class.unarchiveClassDescription: Are you sure you want to unarchive this class?
class.archiveClassDescription: Archived classes are no longer active for new applications but remain accessible for past record review and payment receipt downloads.
class.unarchiveClassConfirmation: Are you sure you want to unarchive this class?
class.unarchiveClassDetails: This class will be moved back to the active classes list and will become available for new applications and management actions.
class.unarchiveClassReversible: You can archive this class again at any time if needed.
class.noClassYet: You don't have any classes yet. Creating a class allows you to specify the recurring timeslots that students can enrol in.
class.noLessonYet: This period does not have any lessons yet.
class.minimumPurchaseLesson: Every student must purchase at all lessons in a period at the same time. If a period has 4 lessons, the student will have to purchase 4 lessons at least.

phases.deletePhaseDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this period?
phases.noLessons: You have not entered any lessons in one of the phases. Either enter the lessons or delete the period.
phases.title: Delete period

class.dropInTitle: Allow joining in the middle of a class (Drop In)
class.dropInDescription: Enable students to join an ongoing class at any point during the course. The system will automatically adjust and calculate the tuition fee based on the number of remaining lessons.
class.multipleClassesDescription: Allow users to apply for this class together with other classes
class.multipleApplicantDescription: Allow one person to register for multiple people with one one application. Fees will be calculated accordingly
class.repeatByWeek: Classes will be repeated on a weekly basis.
class.priceForClass: Set as total price of class
class.notHaveTimeslot: There are not time slots for this weekday right now.

tag.description: A tag is a custom label that you assign to the course. You can create tags to identify the course.
tag.createMultipleValues: Value for the category, e.g. 'Beginner' or 'English'
tag.tagName: Name of a category, e.g. 'Level' or 'Topic'
tag.updateTagsSuccess: You have updated course tags successfully.
tag.updateTagsError: Fail to update course tags. Please try again later
tag.tagsDuplicateError: Tags name cannot be duplicate. Please check again.
tag.tagsEmptyError: Tags name cannot be empty. Please check again.

alert: You must publish the course to view the course page.

task.title: To create a complete course, follow these steps:
task.coursePath: Provide a path for your course
task.courseDescription: Describe your course in around 200 words

tourStep.welcomeContent: You have created your first course page. Now we will guide you through the best practices to create an attractive course page to attract more students.
tourStep.clickGuide: You can revisit the tour by clicking the
tourStep.clickGuideContent: located at the bottom of the webpage. If you encounter any issues along the way, dont hesitate to reach out for help
tourStep.floatingButton: By clicking this button, we give you the suggestions for crafting an attractive course landing page.
tourStep.ClickfloatingButton: After clicking the button, a list will pop up.
tourStep.floatingContent: This menu will provide instructions on the actions you need to take in order to publish your course
tourStep.congratulationsContent: You have completed the tour on how to create a course. Now, you can quickly create your first course and start your business
tourStep.descriptionTab: This description provides details about your course. This is what students will see on the course page in order to decide if they would apply for your course.
tourStep.messageTab: You can leave a message for students who have enrolled in your course
tourStep.courseDetailTab: In this tab, you can create, edit, and upload your course
tourStep.name: This will be the name of your course that appears on the navigation bar and during the enrollment steps.
tourStep.path: This will be the link to access your course page. This part will be the link after 'yourdomain/@/'. Make sure it's easy to remember.
tourStep.previewImage: Upload a 21:9 banner to showcase your course. If you can't design one yourself, we can help you with that.
tourStep.descriptionSection: Write a description for your course. This should include information about what you teach and who your target audience is, as well as application procedures.
tourStep.descriptionSection2: You can freely edit the name of the section titles by clicking the 'three lines' icon. You may also rearrange the order, add new or delete existing sections.
tourStep.aiChat: Need help writing a captivating educator description? Our AI helper can do it for you.
tourStep.textEditor: You can provide your students with more information by including images or videos. We've provided a text editor with options to stylize your text.
tourStep.messageTabTextEditor: You may want to send additional info to students after they sign up, such as the link to your course or any preparation they'll need before the first lesson.
tourStep.messageTabTextEditor2: This content will be displayed in the email sent to students after they enrol in your course
tourStep.noClassYet: You can create a class here later to recruit students
tourStep.publishCourse: You can publish your course here and start recruiting students
tourStep.classColumn: Here are the list of classes you have created. A class corresponds to a specific schedule.
tourStep.className: The class name should be a short description of the schedule of your class.  For example a 'Monday 8:00AM Class', or a 'Biweekly Beginner Class'.
tourStep.className2: The students see this to choose which schedule they want to enrol in.
tourStep.classTuition: Set the price per lesson for this class. Our system will automatically multiply this by the number of lessons students apply for to determine the total tuition fee.
tourStep.classTuition2: If you only have the price of the entire package of classes, simply divide the total price by the number of lessons.
tourStep.classQuota: This will be the maximum number of students that can enroll in this class. Afterwards, students must contact you first if they are interested.
tourStep.classSchedule: Here you can define exactly the time of your lessons. We also made it easy for you to add multiple lessons that are within one time frame.
tourStep.classSchedule2: One period should correspond to an entire series of lessons in a course.
tourStep.classSchedule3: We recommend you to name your phases according to the time of the period. For example, 'August Package' or 'Winter Session'.
tourStep.classCalendar: You can view the a calendar of all the lessons of your class here.

duplicateCourse.modalDescription: Please select the destination institution and confirm the course details before duplicating.

courseGuide: How to create a complete course?

SEO.titleDeleteDialog: Are you sure you want to delete this SEO setting?
SEO.SEOSettingsDelete: SEO will be set to default, are you sure you want to delete this SEO setting?

appointment.minimumNoticeDescription: The minimum notice time before the lesson starts
appointment.bufferBeforeDescription: The time before the lesson starts
appointment.bufferAfterDescription: The time after the lesson ends
appointment.tryCreateAvailability: You need to create availability first before using appointment classes. Click here to create availability.

regularV2.betaWarning: This feature is currently in beta. Some bugs might occur. Please contact our support team if you encounter any issues.

regularV2.mustSelectUntilEnd: Must select until end of period
regularV2.mustSelectUntilEndDesc: Students can start anytime but must continue to end
regularV2.byNumberOfPeriodsDesc: Fixed price per period (Only available for "Must select entire period")
regularV2.allLessonsPassed: It is possible that all lessons have passed or no lessons are scheduled for the current period.
regularV2.dayPatternDescription: Classes will repeat at the specified interval of days

errors.periodEndTimeEarlierThanStartTime: The end time of the period cannot be earlier than the start time

createClassModal.appointmentsMembershipDescription: You can set up Appointments and Membership options using the button in the upper right corner of the calendar.
